lo_shu.model: Lo Shu fixed-sum fiber uses center g=S/3 and integer parameters (a,b).

lo_shu_lattice_formula.statement: For fixed center g, put m=min(g-1,9-g). The bounded Lo Shu fiber is the lattice diamond |a+b|<=m, |a-b|<=m, with count 2m^2+2m+1.

metadata.description: Initial bounded magic-polytope checks for the Sagrada ray and Lo Shu S=24 fiber.
